maps.name: Clearfell
imageDescriptions:
Boss: +10% Cold Res
Mysterious Campsite - Skill Gem (Lvl 1)

Boss: +10% Cold Res
Mysterious Campsite - Skill Gem (Lvl 1)

quests.name: Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack (Cold Resistance bonus)

maps.name: Grelwood
imageDescriptions:
Each Point of interest has a chance for:
Tree of Souls + Waypoint
Boss (Brambleghast) - Uncut Skill Gem (Lvl 1)
Grim Tangle Entrance
Areagne’s Hut - Flasks and Uncut Skill Gem (Lvl 1)

quests.name: Find Way Point - Summon Una (near WP)
Go to Grim Tangle (center of zone)
Go to Cemetery of the Eternals
Kill Draven, the Eternal Praetor - Loot
Kill Asinia, the Praetor's Consort - Loot
Go to Cemetery > Talk to Lachlann
Kill Lachlann of Endless Lament > Loot
Kill The King in the Mists (30 Spirit bonus)
Portal to Town > Talk to NPCs > Waypoint to Hunting Grounds
Take Una's Lute from Una's Lute Box (before farms)
!! ONCE PER LEAGUE !! : Find Smithing Tools (salvage bench) > Portal to Town > Talk to Renly > Return
Kill Candlemass, the Living Rite (Life bonus)
Kill Count Geonor (Down stairs to Arena)
Talk to NPCs - Talk to Hooded One - Go to Act 2
Select Desert Map to Mawdun Quarry
Take Everburning Cinders and Ignite Water Goddess
Go to Lightless Passage (center of zone)
Speak to Lurking Creature (Reveal Desecrated mods)
Kill monsters for Sun Clan Relic
Kill Iktab, the Deathlord and Ekbab, Ancient Steed
Desert Map to Valley of Titans
Activate Medallion near WP (Charm bonus, can be changed)
Activate 3 Ancient Seals around the zone
Talk to NPCs for The Horn of the Vastiri
Go to the front of the caravan and Sound The Horn
Find Lailuma's Body (Fallen Dekhara) - Take Final Letter
Kill Hunin, Storm Caller and Mugin, Frost Bringer
Activate Sisters of Garukhan shrine (Lightning Resistance boost)
Go to Dreadnought Vanguard ( Deleted in 0.5 )
Go to Venom Crypts (center of zone near WP)
Take Corpse-snake Venom from Corpse (end of zone)
Talk to Servi (Various boosts, cannot be changed)
Go to Infested Barrens (opposite from WP)
Go to Azak Bog ( Entrance in Maltan Waterways after 0.5 )

maps.name: Azak Bog ( Entrance in Maltan Waterways after 0.5 )

quests.name: Kill Ignagduk, the Bog Witch (30 Spirit bonus)
Go to Chimeral Wetlands (opposite Azak Bog)
Go to Jiquani's Machinarium (within boss arena)
Kill Blackjaw, the Remnant (Fire Resistance boost)
Activate Large Soul Core near Alva
Kill Zicoatl, Warden of the Core
Go to Matlan Waterways ( Entrance in Jungle Ruins after 0.5 )
Pull the large Canal Lever (end of zone)
Go down the stairs and Talk Alva
Kill Queen of Filth (end of zone)
Kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
Place and stab Sacrificial Heart (2 skillpoints)
Kill Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge and Doryani's Triumph
Talk to Alva - Go to Act 4

Three out of the first four of these islands are essential for the main quest, but the required islands will change between leagues. One of these four islands also holds Matiki, who needs to be saved to access Eye of Hinekora. The island boss rewards also change between leagues. The optional bosses may be skipped.
Talk to NPCs for Book Charter

maps.name: Journey's End
imageDescriptions: MAJOR CHANGE IN 0.4 : Completing the Dark Mists Quest (defeating Omniphobia) will now grant +2 Weapon Set Skill Points

quests.name: Talk to Dannig for Verisium Spikes
Kill Krutog, Lord of Kin (end of zone)
Activate Goddess of Justice (Flask recovery, can be changed)
Kill Scourge of the Skies (end of zone)
Go to Halls of the Dead (further down)
Go to Trial of the Ancestors
Enter church, Exit the church, Destroy forcefield
Kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
Kill Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
Go to Heart of the Tribe
Kill Tavakai, the Chieftain (3 Phase fight)
You can select in any order: Ogham, Vastiri, or Mount Kriara
Kill Heldra of the Black Pyre and Isolde of the White Shroud
Kill Siora, Blade of the Mists
Kill Oswin, the Dread Warden (2 skillpoints)
Go to Holten > Go to Holten Estate
Kill Thane Wulfric and Lady Elswyth (ground floor)
Talk to Hooded One > Select Next area
Kill Akthi, the Final Sting and Anundr, the Sandworm (top right)
Go to Pools of Khatal (bottom left)
Activate Seven Pillars (Various boosts, can be changed)
Talk to Hooded One > Select Next area
Kill Lythara, the Wayward Spear (40 Spirit boost)
Kill Zelina, Blood Priestess and Zolin, Blood Priest
Talk to Hooded One > Select Next area
Run one map in Ziggurat to unlock maps
Start mapping in hideout. ( Finally you can start playing the game. Well done. )
400th quest. We can't leave it at 399, can we?
